memberdef.definition: using LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::exec_space = ExecSpace
memberdef.name: exec_space

briefdescription.para: The type of the Kokkos execution space used by this class.

memberdef.definition: using LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::memory_space = MemorySpace
memberdef.name: memory_space

briefdescription.para: The type of the Kokkos memory space used by this class.

memberdef.definition: using LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::continuous_dimension_type = typename LagrangeBasis::continuous_dimension_type
memberdef.name: continuous_dimension_type

briefdescription.para: The type of the evaluation continuous dimension (continuous dimension of interest) used by this class.

memberdef.definition: using LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::lagrange_basis_type = LagrangeBasis
memberdef.name: lagrange_basis_type

briefdescription.para: The discrete dimension representing the Lagrange basis.

memberdef.definition: using LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::basis_domain_type = typename LagrangeBasis::template Impl<LagrangeBasis, MemorySpace>::knot_grid
memberdef.name: basis_domain_type

briefdescription.para: The grid on which the interpolation coefficients should be provided.

memberdef.definition: using LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::evaluation_domain_type = IdxRange<InterpolationGrid>
memberdef.name: evaluation_domain_type

briefdescription.para: The type of the domain for the 1D evaluation mesh used by this class.

memberdef.definition: using LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::batched_evaluation_domain_type = BatchedInterpolationGrid
memberdef.name: batched_evaluation_domain_type

briefdescription.para: The type of the whole domain representing evaluation points.

parameterdescription.para: batched discrete domain on which the interpolation points are defined.

memberdef.definition: using LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::lagrange_domain_type = IdxRange<basis_domain_type>
memberdef.name: lagrange_domain_type

briefdescription.para: The type of the 1D Lagrange domain corresponding to the dimension of interest.

memberdef.definition: using LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::batch_domain_type = ddc::remove_dims_of_t<BatchedInterpolationGrid, InterpolationGrid>
memberdef.name: batch_domain_type

briefdescription.para: The type of the batch domain (obtained by removing the dimension of interest from the whole domain).

parameterdescription.para: batched discrete domain on which the interpolation points are defined.

memberdef.definition: using LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::batched_lagrange_domain_type = ddc::replace_dim_of_t<BatchedInterpolationDDom, InterpolationGrid, basis_domain_type>
memberdef.name: batched_lagrange_domain_type

briefdescription.para: The type of the whole Lagrange domain (cartesian product of 1D Lagrange domain and batch domain) preserving the order of dimensions.

parameterdescription.para: batched discrete domain on which the interpolation points are defined.

memberdef.definition: using LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::lower_extrapolation_rule_type = LowerExtrapolationRule
memberdef.name: lower_extrapolation_rule_type

briefdescription.para: The type of the extrapolation rule at the lower boundary.

memberdef.definition: using LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::upper_extrapolation_rule_type = UpperExtrapolationRule
memberdef.name: upper_extrapolation_rule_type

briefdescription.para: The type of the extrapolation rule at the upper boundary.

memberdef.definition: LowerExtrapolationRule LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::m_lower_extrap_rule
memberdef.name: m_lower_extrap_rule

memberdef.definition: UpperExtrapolationRule LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::m_upper_extrap_rule
memberdef.name: m_upper_extrap_rule

memberdef.definition: LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::LagrangeEvaluator
memberdef.name: LagrangeEvaluator

briefdescription.para: Build a LagrangeEvaluator acting on batched_lagrange_domain.

parameterdescription.para: The extrapolation rule at the lower boundary.
The extrapolation rule at the upper boundary.

memberdef.definition: LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::LagrangeEvaluator
memberdef.name: LagrangeEvaluator

briefdescription.para: Copy-constructs.

parameterdescription.para: A reference to another LagrangeEvaluator.

memberdef.definition: LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::LagrangeEvaluator
memberdef.name: LagrangeEvaluator

briefdescription.para: Move-constructs.

parameterdescription.para: An rvalue to another LagrangeEvaluator.

memberdef.definition: LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::~LagrangeEvaluator
memberdef.name: ~LagrangeEvaluator

briefdescription.para: Destructs.

memberdef.definition: LagrangeEvaluator & LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::operator=
memberdef.name: operator=

briefdescription.para: Copy-assigns.

parameterdescription.para: A reference to another LagrangeEvaluator.

memberdef.definition: LagrangeEvaluator & LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::operator=
memberdef.name: operator=

briefdescription.para: Move-assigns.

parameterdescription.para: An rvalue to another LagrangeEvaluator.

memberdef.definition: lower_extrapolation_rule_type LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::lower_extrapolation_rule
memberdef.name: lower_extrapolation_rule

briefdescription.para: Get the lower extrapolation rule.

detaileddescription.para: Extrapolation rules are functors used to define the behaviour of the LagrangeEvaluator outside the domain where the break points of the Lagrange basis are defined.

memberdef.definition: upper_extrapolation_rule_type LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::upper_extrapolation_rule
memberdef.name: upper_extrapolation_rule

briefdescription.para: Get the upper extrapolation rule.

detaileddescription.para: Extrapolation rules are functors used to define the behaviour of the LagrangeEvaluator outside the domain where the break points of the Lagrange basis are defined.

memberdef.definition: KOKKOS_FUNCTION DataType LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::operator()
memberdef.argsstring: (Coord< CoordsDims... > const &coord_eval, ConstField< DataType, BatchedLagrangeIdxRange, memory_space, Layout > const lagrange_coef) const
memberdef.name: operator()

param.type: ConstField< DataType, BatchedLagrangeIdxRange, memory_space, Layout > const

briefdescription.para: Evaluate 1D Lagrange polynomial (described by its Lagrange coefficients) at a given coordinate.

detaileddescription.para: The Lagrange coefficients describe 1D Lagrange polynomials defined on a Lagrange basis. They can be obtained using the IdentityInterpolationBuilder.

parameterdescription.para: The coordinate where the Lagrange polynomial is evaluated. Note that only the component along the dimension of interest is used.
A Field storing the 1D Lagrange coefficients.

simplesect.para: The value of the Lagrange polynomial at the desired coordinate.

memberdef.definition: void LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::operator()
memberdef.argsstring: (Field< DataType, IdxRangeBatchedInterpolation, memory_space, Layout1 > const lagrange_eval, ConstField< Coord< CoordsDims... >, IdxRangeBatchedInterpolation, memory_space, Layout2 > const coords_eval, ConstField< DataType, batched_lagrange_domain_type< IdxRangeBatchedInterpolation >, memory_space, Layout3 > const lagrange_coef) const
memberdef.name: operator()

param.type: Field< DataType, IdxRangeBatchedInterpolation, memory_space, Layout1 > const
ConstField< Coord< CoordsDims... >, IdxRangeBatchedInterpolation, memory_space, Layout2 > const
ConstField< DataType, batched_lagrange_domain_type< IdxRangeBatchedInterpolation >, memory_space, Layout3 > const

briefdescription.para: Evaluate Lagrange polynomials (described by their Lagrange coefficients) on a mesh.

detaileddescription.para: The Lagrange coefficients describe Lagrange polynomials defined on a cartesian product of batch_idx_range and Lagrange basis. They can be obtained using the IdentityInterpolationBuilder.

This is not a multidimensional evaluation. This is a batched 1D evaluation. This means that for each slice of coordinates identified by a batch_domain_type::discrete_element_type, the evaluation is performed with the 1D set of Lagrange coefficients identified by the same batch_domain_type::discrete_element_type.

parameterdescription.para: The values of the Lagrange polynomials at the desired coordinates.

The coordinates where the Lagrange polynomials are evaluated. Those are stored in a Field defined on a BatchedInterpolationIdxRange. Note that the coordinates of the points represented by this index range are unused and irrelevant.
A Field storing the Lagrange coefficients.

memberdef.definition: void LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::operator()
memberdef.argsstring: (Field< DataType, BatchedInterpolationGrid, memory_space, Layout1 > const lagrange_eval, ConstField< DataType, batched_lagrange_domain_type< BatchedInterpolationGrid >, memory_space, Layout2 > const lagrange_coef) const
memberdef.name: operator()

param.type: Field< DataType, BatchedInterpolationGrid, memory_space, Layout1 > const
ConstField< DataType, batched_lagrange_domain_type< BatchedInterpolationGrid >, memory_space, Layout2 > const

briefdescription.para: Evaluate Lagrange polynomials (described by their Lagrange coefficients) on a mesh.

detaileddescription.para: The Lagrange coefficients describe Lagrange polynomials defined on a cartesian product of batch_idx_range and Lagrange basis. They can be obtained using the IdentityInterpolationBuilder.

This is not a multidimensional evaluation. This is a batched 1D evaluation. This means that for each slice of coordinates identified by a batch_domain_type::discrete_element_type, the evaluation is performed with the 1D set of Lagrange coefficients identified by the same batch_domain_type::discrete_element_type.

parameterdescription.para: The values of the Lagrange polynomials at the mesh points.
A Field storing the Lagrange coefficients.

memberdef.definition: KOKKOS_INLINE_FUNCTION DataType LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::eval
memberdef.argsstring: (Coord< CoordsDims... > const &coord_eval, ConstField< DataType, lagrange_domain_type, memory_space, Layout > const lagrange_coef) const
memberdef.name: eval

param.type: ConstField< DataType, lagrange_domain_type, memory_space, Layout > const

memberdef.definition: KOKKOS_INLINE_FUNCTION DataType LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::eval_no_bc
memberdef.argsstring: (Idx< DerivDims... > const &deriv_order, Coord< CoordsDims... > const &coord_eval, ConstField< DataType, lagrange_domain_type, memory_space, Layout > const lagrange_coef) const
memberdef.name: eval_no_bc

param.type: ConstField< DataType, lagrange_domain_type, memory_space, Layout > const

memberdef.definition: KOKKOS_INLINE_FUNCTION auto LagrangeEvaluator< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, DataType, LagrangeBasis, InterpolationGrid, LowerExtrapolationRule, UpperExtrapolationRule >::getclosest
memberdef.name: getclosest

briefdescription.para: Get the knot index closest to the provided coordinate.
A class to evaluate, differentiate or integrate a Lagrange function.

detaileddescription.para: A class which contains an operator () which can be used to evaluate, or differentiate a Lagrange polynomial.

parameterdescription.para: The Kokkos execution space on which the Lagrange evaluation is performed.
The Kokkos memory space on which the data (Lagrange coefficients and evaluation) is stored.
The data type on which calculations are made.
The discrete dimension representing the Lagrange basis.
The discrete dimension on which evaluation points are defined.
The lower extrapolation rule type.
The upper extrapolation rule type.
